2026-04-22T17:07:36.8839536Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-22T17:07:36.8840423Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T17:07:36.8840862Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T17:07:36.8841233Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T17:07:36.8841550Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T17:07:36.8841792Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-22T17:07:36.8843349Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-22T17:09:39.7096641Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-22T17:09:21.715067437Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58507,\"title\":\"Move Azure.Identity tests into Azure.Core so they live alongside the code\",\"body\":\"## Background\\n\\nThe Azure.Identity source code has been consolidated into Azure.Core. All identity types now live under [`sdk/core/Azure.Core/src/Identity/`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/src/Identity), and the `Azure.Identity` package is now effectively a shim consisting of [`TypeForwarders.cs`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/src/TypeForwarders.cs).\\n\\nHowever, the corresponding tests still live under [`sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/tests/`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/tests) (~144 files, including `ConfigurableCredentials/`, `Mock/`, `Data/`, `samples/`, `Properties/`) and are only wired into `sdk/identity/Azure.Identity.sln`. They are **not** part of `sdk/core/Azure.Core/Azure.Core.sln`.\\n\\nThis means a contributor who opens `Azure.Core.sln` in Visual Studio to work on identity code in `sdk/core/Azure.Core/src/Identity/` has no in-IDE way to discover, build, or run the tests covering their changes.\\n\\n## Goals\\n\\n1. **Co-locate** the identity tests with the identity source under `sdk/core/Azure.Core/`.\\n2. **Surface** the tests in Visual Studio when opening `sdk/core/Azure.Core/Azure.Core.sln`.\\n\\n## Out of scope\\n\\n- Rewriting tests, changing test framework, or altering test coverage.\\n- Decoupling/removing the `Azure.Identity` package shim.\\n\\n## Suggested approach (non-prescriptive)\\n\\nThe exact project layout is left to the implementer. Reasonable options include:\\n\\n- Relocate the existing `Azure.Identity.Tests.csproj` (and its assets under `tests/`) to a new path under `sdk/core/Azure.Core/tests/`, renaming as appropriate (e.g., `Azure.Core.Identity.Tests`).\\n- Or split into a new test project under `sdk/core/Azure.Core/tests/` and migrate files.\\n\\nWhichever shape is chosen, the implementer will likely need to:\\n\\n- Update assembly name, namespace roots, and any `InternalsVisibleTo` entries.\\n- Add the relocated project(s) to `sdk/core/Azure.Core/Azure.Core.sln`.\\n- Remove the project from (or update) `sdk/identity/Azure.Identity.sln`.\\n- Update CI wiring (`sdk/core/ci.yml`, `sdk/core/tests.yml`, `sdk/identity/ci.yml`, `sdk/identity/tests.yml`) so the identity tests still execute on PRs that touch `sdk/core/Azure.Core/src/Identity/**`.\\n- Bring along all test assets: recordings under `Data/`, samples, platform-specific native test assets, and `Properties/`.\\n- Update any path-based references (Directory.Build.props quirks, snippet sources, test resource templates).\\n\\n## Acceptance criteria\\n\\n- [ ] No identity test code remains under `sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/tests/` (or it is a thin redirect, depending on chosen approach).\\n- [ ] Opening `sdk/core/Azure.Core/Azure.Core.sln` in Visual Studio shows the identity test project(s) and they build.\\n- [ ] `dotnet test` against the relocated project passes locally (skipping `TestCategory!=Live`).\\n- [ ] CI continues to execute the identity tests on PRs that modify `sdk/core/Azure.Core/src/Identity/**`.\\n- [ ] `sdk/identity/Azure.Identity.sln` either still builds cleanly or is updated to reflect the move.\\n\\n## Notes / risks\\n\\n- Test recordings, MSAL native dependencies, and platform-specific assets (Linux/Mac/Windows native methods, certificates) need to come along with the move.\\n- `Azure.Identity.sln`, `sdk/identity/ci.yml`, and `sdk/identity/tests.yml` will need updates so they don\\u0026#39;\\u0026#39;t reference a missing tests project.\\n- Live test pipeline / TestResources may need to be re-pointed at the new location.\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58507\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"scottaddie\",\"id\":10702007,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/scottaddie\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/10702007?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Client\",\"Azure.Core\",\"Azure.Identity\"],\"assignees\":[\"m-nash\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-22T17:05:55Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-22T17:06:28Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

2026-04-22T17:09:39.7128702Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-22T17:09:21.984691096Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58507,\"title\":\"Move Azure.Identity tests into Azure.Core so they live alongside the code\",\"body\":\"## Background\\n\\nThe Azure.Identity source code has been consolidated into Azure.Core. All identity types now live under [`sdk/core/Azure.Core/src/Identity/`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/src/Identity), and the `Azure.Identity` package is now effectively a shim consisting of [`TypeForwarders.cs`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/src/TypeForwarders.cs).\\n\\nHowever, the corresponding tests still live under [`sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/tests/`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/tests) (~144 files, including `ConfigurableCredentials/`, `Mock/`, `Data/`, `samples/`, `Properties/`) and are only wired into `sdk/identity/Azure.Identity.sln`. They are **not** part of `sdk/core/Azure.Core/Azure.Core.sln`.\\n\\nThis means a contributor who opens `Azure.Core.sln` in Visual Studio to work on identity code in `sdk/core/Azure.Core/src/Identity/` has no in-IDE way to discover, build, or run the tests covering their changes.\\n\\n## Goals\\n\\n1. **Co-locate** the identity tests with the identity source under `sdk/core/Azure.Core/`.\\n2. **Surface** the tests in Visual Studio when opening `sdk/core/Azure.Core/Azure.Core.sln`.\\n\\n## Out of scope\\n\\n- Rewriting tests, changing test framework, or altering test coverage.\\n- Decoupling/removing the `Azure.Identity` package shim.\\n\\n## Suggested approach (non-prescriptive)\\n\\nThe exact project layout is left to the implementer. Reasonable options include:\\n\\n- Relocate the existing `Azure.Identity.Tests.csproj` (and its assets under `tests/`) to a new path under `sdk/core/Azure.Core/tests/`, renaming as appropriate (e.g., `Azure.Core.Identity.Tests`).\\n- Or split into a new test project under `sdk/core/Azure.Core/tests/` and migrate files.\\n\\nWhichever shape is chosen, the implementer will likely need to:\\n\\n- Update assembly name, namespace roots, and any `InternalsVisibleTo` entries.\\n- Add the relocated project(s) to `sdk/core/Azure.Core/Azure.Core.sln`.\\n- Remove the project from (or update) `sdk/identity/Azure.Identity.sln`.\\n- Update CI wiring (`sdk/core/ci.yml`, `sdk/core/tests.yml`, `sdk/identity/ci.yml`, `sdk/identity/tests.yml`) so the identity tests still execute on PRs that touch `sdk/core/Azure.Core/src/Identity/**`.\\n- Bring along all test assets: recordings under `Data/`, samples, platform-specific native test assets, and `Properties/`.\\n- Update any path-based references (Directory.Build.props quirks, snippet sources, test resource templates).\\n\\n## Acceptance criteria\\n\\n- [ ] No identity test code remains under `sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/tests/` (or it is a thin redirect, depending on chosen approach).\\n- [ ] Opening `sdk/core/Azure.Core/Azure.Core.sln` in Visual Studio shows the identity test project(s) and they build.\\n- [ ] `dotnet test` against the relocated project passes locally (skipping `TestCategory!=Live`).\\n- [ ] CI continues to execute the identity tests on PRs that modify `sdk/core/Azure.Core/src/Identity/**`.\\n- [ ] `sdk/identity/Azure.Identity.sln` either still builds cleanly or is updated to reflect the move.\\n\\n## Notes / risks\\n\\n- Test recordings, MSAL native dependencies, and platform-specific assets (Linux/Mac/Windows native methods, certificates) need to come along with the move.\\n- `Azure.Identity.sln`, `sdk/identity/ci.yml`, and `sdk/identity/tests.yml` will need updates so they don\\u0026#39;\\u0026#39;t reference a missing tests project.\\n- Live test pipeline / TestResources may need to be re-pointed at the new location.\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58507\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"scottaddie\",\"id\":10702007,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/scottaddie\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/10702007?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Client\",\"Azure.Core\",\"Azure.Identity\"],\"assignees\":[\"m-nash\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-22T17:05:55Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-22T17:06:28Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
